title: Response
description: An existing or proposed policy or programme response to ≥1 Problems. Migrated from content/auckland/schema/response.schema.json. Structural changes: (1) actor (sector enum, 7-value) retained; actor_id added as optional typed Actor reference — both coexist per ratified decision §5.7 (sector is an analytical typology for rollups; actor_id is a referent); (2) applies_in added (E_applies_in, Response → Region) — uniform with Camp's applicable_in/efficacy_in; (3) evidence_ids → claim_ids (E_evidenced_by); (4) source_ids removed (Claim-mediated per P3 ratification); (5) theme added. Response.actor sector enum is response_sector_typology_v1.

actor.description: Sector typology of the responding actor (response_sector_typology_v1). Used for cross-region 'who responds' rollups. Separate from actor_id.

actor_id.description: Optional typed reference to a specific Actor entity. Supplements the sector enum (ratified §5.7). Null when no typed Actor entity exists for the responding organisation.

addresses.description: Problems this Response targets. ≥1 required. Materialises to E_addresses.

applies_in.description: Regions where this Response applies. Materialises to E_applies_in. Absent implies national unless actor.governs constrains scope.

claim_ids.description: Claims evidencing this Response. Materialises to E_evidenced_by.
